title: Colossal Spicy Tools
description: Improves the appearance of tools, making them larger and sharper. 🔨
body:
<center>

![Colossal Spicy Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b42ae7edb6b6c6fd8613fde3bf363c7526ef5e0.png)
  
</center>

  > «Colossal Spicy Tools» — this is resource pack replaces the textures of all the standard tools in Minecraft - axes, hoes, picks and shovels. The new textures apply to all types of materials: wood, stone, iron, gold, diamond, netherite AND COPPER.


# Demonstration of textures of all types of instrument's:
![Demonstration: «Colossal Spicy Tools»](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/J0JgFwCg/images/e7d7c7f319f9d38820b1fb68c26c90addd7ee0ce.png)
> The style is massive and slightly "sharp" so that the tools look brighter and stand out from the standard ones. Suitable for those who want to add a little visual variety without a strong departure from the vanilla atmosphere.

This resource pack was inspired by another resource pack called «[Spicy Tools](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/spicy-tools-4960568/)» by [Lin-y-Fer](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/lin-y-fer/) which hasn't been updated in 4 years. So I decided to revive it in this way, inspired by the tools from the original, redrawing and slightly changing the color palette of the textures.
